name: SYNOPSYS INC
summary: Synopsys, Inc. is a global leader in electronic design automation (EDA) software, semiconductor IP, and simulation and analysis (S&A) solutions. The company provides tools for IC design, verification, and manufacturing, including cloud-based design flows, logic libraries, embedded memories, interface IP, and security IP. Following its acquisition of ANSYS, Inc., Synopsys also offers engineering simulation and analysis software used across aerospace, automotive, healthcare, and other industries to accelerate product development.

products.name: EDA Suite
products.description: Tools for IC design steps including RTL design, synthesis, verification, place and route, and physical verification.

products.name: Ansys Simulation and Analysis Software
products.description: Engineering simulation and analysis tools used across industries for product design, testing, validation and deployment.

products.name: Logic Libraries
products.description: Pre-designed silicon-proven logic library IP components for chip designs.

products.name: Embedded Memories IP
products.description: Pre-designed embedded memory circuits used as components in larger chip designs.

products.name: Wired Interface IP
products.description: Silicon-proven wired interface intellectual property for chip integration.

products.name: Memory Interface IP
products.description: Pre-designed memory interface circuits to reduce development risk and speed time to market.

products.name: Security IP
products.description: Pre-designed security intellectual property components for semiconductor chip designs.

products.name: Embedded Processors IP
products.description: Pre-designed embedded processor IP solutions for SoC chip designs.

products.name: Cloud-Based Digital and Analog Design Flow
products.description: Cloud-based EDA platform to boost chip-design development productivity.

products.name: IP Accelerated Initiative
products.description: Architecture design expertise, customized IP subsystems, hardening, and signal and power integrity analysis services.

products.name: Technical Services and Support
products.description: Global expert technical support and design assistance for customers developing advanced chips and electronic systems.
